subs.title: Report settings
subs.titleTip: Here you choose which Excel reports to send, on which day of the week and how often (weekly or monthly). If several reports fall on the same day, you get one file with multiple sheets.
subs.subtitle: Each report can be enabled, have its thresholds, send day and frequency changed, or be removed entirely. It arrives as a single Excel file with the SKU list — no per-product inbox clutter.
subs.channels.title: About delivery channels
subs.channels.emailText: — delivered to the address from your profile. You can change it in
subs.channels.tgText: — you need to link the chat bot via your
subs.channels.tgWarn: If not linked, reports silently fail to arrive.
subs.channels.spamHint: If you don't see them, check the Spam folder.
subs.param.dayHint: Reports scheduled for the same day arrive in one Excel file as separate sheets.
subs.param.deadHint: SKUs with coverage above this number = frozen inventory
subs.param.lowHint: When the SKU's coverage_days becomes less than or equal to this number
subs.kind.weeklyReportDesc: Excel warehouse summary: Health Score, lost revenue, frozen stock, SKU counters, concentration.
subs.kind.underestimatedDesc: Products that sell fast and often run out. Every day out of stock is missed revenue.
subs.kind.criticalDesc: Stock is nearly gone — restocking is urgent.
subs.kind.deadDesc: Slow sales rate — money is frozen in stock. Based on average TVelo over the last 30 days.
subs.kind.lowDesc: When SKU coverage drops to the threshold, the product will soon run out.
subs.kind.stockoutDesc: The SKU is regularly out of stock — a supply problem.
subs.kind.syncErrorDesc: Now sent as a separate email at the moment of failure — a dedicated Excel sheet is no longer generated.
subs.freq.dailyHint: Every day — the day of week is ignored
subs.freq.weeklyHint: Every week on the selected day
subs.freq.monthlyHint: On the first selected weekday of each month
subs.empty.title: You have no subscriptions yet
subs.empty.text: Add reports to receive Excel files with SKU lists for important warehouse events.
subs.allSubscribed: All available reports are already subscribed
subs.add.title: New report
subs.add.note: Parameters (threshold, day, frequency) can be changed after creation. Default is Monday, weekly.
subs.add.takenWarn: This report already has a subscription via the selected channel. Find it in the list above to change parameters or delete it.
